name: bountyhound-agent
description: Smart bug bounty hunting with 155 agents across 11 profiles. v6.2.0: Full exploit chain reasoning engine with 26-capability enables map, graph traversal toward 10 critical impact nodes, 3+-step chain validation protocol, severity uplift calculation, and cross-hunt chain query. Also: planning constraints gate, dependency modeling, fresh-start protocol, confidence calibration, anti-sycophancy, pre-report verification scan, anti-compaction memory protocol. Default: 43 agents (core+web+api).
